arts.ttl: Man United statement made as Storm Darragh leads to Everton vs Liverpool postponement
arts.sum: Manchester United are scheduled to take on Nottingham Forest in the Premier League on Saturday evening

arts.ttl: David Coote’s last game screened on TV following Liverpool fixture disruption

arts.ttl: Liverpool suffer shock trophy setback as major absences prove costly
arts.sum: Liverpool suffered a hugely disappointing FA Youth Cup exit at Preston North End on Friday evening

arts.ttl: Everton vs. Liverpool Postponed as Merseyside Derby is Called Off Due to Storm
arts.sum: This afternoon’s Merseyside derby between Everton and Liverpool at Goodison Park has been postponed due to adverse weather conditions brought on by Storm Darrag

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk details how Slot has slotted in neatly at Liverpool – Keeping Reds on their toes
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk has detailed how Arne Slot has fitted in neatly at Liverpool, replacing Jurgen Klopp with little fanfare. Voetbal Primeur cover comments from the defender today made in an interview with Viaplay in which he lavishes praise on Slot and the work he’s done at Liverpool so far. arts.ttl: When Liverpool game at Everton can be played as most likely Premier League dates emerge
arts.sum: Liverpool are now going to have fit a Goodison derby into their hectic fixture schedule this season

arts.ttl: Liverpool explain three reasons for Everton postponement amid Storm Darragh chaos
arts.sum: The Merseyside derby was postponed on Saturday morning with Liverpool explaining the reasons for the late cancellation as they and Everton now need a new date for the fixture

arts.ttl: Jonathan Tah says midfielder Liverpool let go was just as skilful as Ronaldinho
arts.sum: Liverpool have had some incredibly skilful players in recent years. Luis Diaz has been hailed as the most skilful player at Liverpool in recent times,...

arts.ttl: Man United issue update on Nottingham Forest clash amid chaos caused by Storm Darragh after Everton vs Liverpool was CALLED OFF
arts.sum: The club issued a statement on the fixture, scheduled to kick-off at 5:30pm, after the last Merseyside derby at Goodison Park was called off.

arts.ttl: Liverpool desperate to sign Premier League striker in January after Darwin Nunez troubles
arts.sum: Liverpool are still at the top of the Premier League standings despite losing two points in the title race against Newcastle United. The Reds played a 3-3 draw against Eddie Howe’s side, with Mohamed Salah once again inspiring Arne Slot’s side with a goal and an assist.
